forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting east to southeasterly in the evening.

Sunny. The chance of fog on the eastern slopes in the early morning. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
High
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny morning. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Clear. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny morning. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h shifting west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds southerly 20 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon.

Sunny. The chance of fog in the south in the early morning. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Mostly sunny morning. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h shifting west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 25 km/h before tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon then becoming light in the evening.

Patchy fog in the early morning. Sunny day. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny day. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending southerly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening.

Patchy morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny morning. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 30 km/h before turning northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then turning southerly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Clear. Light winds.

Sunny. Patchy fog in the west in the early morning. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending southerly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly in the late afternoon then becoming light in the evening.

Patchy fog in the early morning. Sunny day. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Clear. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.
Sunny. Patchy fog in the south in the early morning. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 31.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Clear. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late evening.
Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 29.

Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Clear. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening.

Mostly sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.
High
Sun protection 10:00am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 29 to 35.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Clear. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon.
Sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Mostly sunny morning. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h shifting west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Clear. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Mostly sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny morning. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h shifting west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Clear. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.
Sunny. Winds northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 29 to 35.

Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Clear. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending east to northeasterly in the morning then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the morning then tending northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Leigh Creek in the afternoon. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 31.
